sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n26102" key="diatraxhli/zomai" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">διατρᾰχηλίζομαι</orth>, <sense id="n26102.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">putone's neck under theyoke,</tr_> Teles<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1595.tlg271:p.10H" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.10H.</biblScope> </bibl> </sense> <sense n="II" id="n26102.1" level="2" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">fall head over heels,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.501e</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
